title: Senior Financial Analyst - National Insurance Holdings Services - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - National Insurance Holdings Services - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with National Insurance Holdings Services! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Jaipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About National Insurance Holdings Services:
National Insurance Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with National Insurance Holdings Services!
